function.name: search_site_specs
function.description: Search site specifications and infrastructure details for a data center site.

query.description: What to look up (e.g., 'fiber termination spec', 'power capacity').

function.name: search_work_iq
function.description: Search WorkIQ for active work orders, maintenance tasks, and assignments.

function.name: get_repair_procedure
function.description: Look up step-by-step repair procedures for data center equipment.

function.name: analyze_document
function.description: Analyze a technical document or specification sheet using Document Understanding.

document_url.description: URL or path to the document to analyze.

function.name: query_site_reliability
function.description: Ask the Fabric data agent (Fabric IQ) for site reliability information. Use this for questions about current site health, telemetry trends, open or recent incidents, daily availability/SLO performance, and which subcontractor was dispatched for an incident. The data agent has access to per-minute optical / power / thermal / latency telemetry plus the incident log and daily SLO summary for every data center fleet site (Quincy North, East US DC-4/7/9, Singapore South/West, Sweden Central DC-1/2, Spain Central DC-1).

question.description: The natural-language question to forward to the Fabric data agent. Be specific about the site name when known (e.g., 'How is Quincy North performing in the last hour?').

function.name: recall_learned_procedures
function.description: Recall procedural memories you have learned from past field-tech conversations. Call this when a user asks how to do something and you want to make sure you're applying any site-specific overrides or clarifying-question patterns you've learned. The procedures are also prepended to your system prompt at startup as 'Learned procedures' — this tool gives you on-demand access for explicit inspection (e.g., when a user asks 'what have you learned?'). Each procedure has applicable_to (when it fires) and instruction (what to do).

situation.description: Optional free-text description of the situation.
